info.name: Farmbox API (gerado do .apib)
info.description: Coleção construída a partir do API Blueprint. Ajuste bodies/auth conforme necessário.

request.description:
Lists all Activity Types

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Base)
        + global: true (boolean, optional) - returns global activity types
        + by_client: false (boolean, optional) - returns client activity types

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + activity_types (array[Activity Type])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Base

Lists all cultures

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Page)

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + cultures (array[Culture])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Simple Base

Lists all culture varieties

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Base)

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + varieties (array[Variety])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Base

Info from a single variety

+ Request
    + Headers

              Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Variety

Creates a new variety

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Variety Base)

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Variety

Updates an existing variety

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Variety Base)

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Variety

Lists all phenological stages
+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Base)
        + culture_id: 156 (number, optional) - Culture identifier
        + classification: 1 (number, optional) - Actual phenological stage classification
        

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + phenological_stages (array[Phenological Stage])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Base

Plantation is the concept from a plot in a harvest. Plots are timeless objects on Farmbox, so when a
plot became present/active on a new harvest it'll create a plantation, and all the operations after that
are executed on the plantation object.

Lists all active plantations (plots on harvests)

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Base)
        + observation: filtro (string, optional) - Filter plantations by observation
        + from_harvest_ids: 4233 (number, optional) - Harvest or List identifier to filter by

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + plantations (array[Plantation])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Base

Info from a single plantation

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Plantation

Creates a new plantation

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Plantation Base
        + include Plantation Relationship

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Plantation

Updates an existing plantation

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Plantation Base
        + include Plantation Relationship

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Plantation

Lists all Batch

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Page) 
        + by_validity: 2023-11-13 (string, optional) - Validity Date
        + by_input_id: 21 (number, optional) - Input identifier
        + by_batch_number: `ACB12354DF` (string, optional) - Name Batch

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + batches (array[Batch])
        + include Collection Response Paginated Simple Base

Info from a single Batch

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()

    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Batch Base

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Batch

Lists all movimentations

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Base)
        + by_start_date: `2015-05-05` (string, optional) - Date Start
        + by_end_date: `2015-05-05` (string, optional) - Date End

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + movimentations (array[Movimentation])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Base

Info from a single movimentation

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Movimentation

Creates a new movimentation

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Movimentation Base
        + include Movimentation Upload File
        + batch_attributes (Batch Attributes, optional)
        
+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Movimentation

Updates an existing movimentation

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Movimentation Base
        + include Movimentation Upload File

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Movimentation

Lists the monitorings

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN
            
    + Attributes (Query Base)
        + start_date: `2015-05-05` (string, optional) - Date Start for field close date
        + end_date: `2015-05-10` (string, optional) - Date End for field close date


+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + monitorings (array[Monitoring Detail])
        + Include Collection Response Paginated Base
Monitoring Day Result is the final result from all monitorings on a single day to a single plantation

Lists the results from each day monitored to each plantation

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN
    
    + Attributes (Query Base)

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + monitoring_day_results (array[Monitoring Day Result])
        + include Collection Response Paginated Simple Base

        + include Collection Response Paginated Base

Lists all cropped volumes from plantation

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes (Query Base)

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + cropped_volumes (array[Cropped Volume])
        + include Collection Response Paginated Simple Base

Info from a single cropped volume

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Cropped Volume

Increment plantation cropped volume.

Volume will be added (sum) to the existing plantation cropped volume

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Cropped Volume Base

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Cropped Volume

Updates an existing cropped volume...
This will not affect productivity from already cropped/closed plantations

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + Cropped Volume Base

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Cropped Volume

The concept is to register a URL for a resource type with the intention of notifying the provider of each change.
At the moment, only the application resource is available.

List all resource subscriptions registered

+ Request
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()

+ Response 200 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + resource_subscriptions (array[Resource Subscription])

Creates a new resource subscription

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Resource Subscription Base

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + Resource Subscription

Updates an existing resource subscription

+ Request (application/json)
    + Headers

            Authorization: SECRET_TOKEN

    + Attributes ()
        + include Resource Subscription Base

+ Response 201 (application/json)
    + Attributes ()
        + include Resource Subscription
